mnemonics: AR-MA's PACF cuts off sharply, like a sharp memory (for AR) or a moving average's slow fade (for MA).
keyPoints: For an AR(p) model, the PACF cuts off after lag p, while the ACF decays.
For an MA(q) model, the ACF cuts off after lag q, while the PACF decays.
The Yule-Walker equations relate the ACF parameters to the model coefficients for AR processes.
commonMistakes: Confusing the ACF and PACF patterns for AR and MA models, leading to incorrect model identification.
Misapplying estimation techniques meant for AR models (like Yule-Walker) to MA or ARMA models without modification.
Forgetting to check for stationarity and invertibility conditions after estimating the model parameters.
